# cppcheck suppressions for M1 firmware
#
# Suppress warnings that are expected in embedded firmware or vendor HAL code.
# Add specific file:line suppressions as the codebase is cleaned up.

# FatFs and vendor HAL use non-standard patterns
missingIncludeSystem

# Vendor HAL files use intentional fallthrough and casts
variableScope:Drivers/*
variableScope:Middlewares/*
variableScope:NFC/*

# The protocol decoders use large stack-allocated arrays by design
# (no heap allocation allowed per architecture rules)
stackVariable

# Suppress for auto-generated CubeMX code
unusedFunction:Core/Src/stm32h5xx_hal_msp.c
unusedFunction:Core/Src/stm32h5xx_it.c
